# Project Status ‚Äî Knowledge Base

<!-- Reset at extraction (2026-06-05). The parent project's knowledge base
     concerned lanes outside this subproject's scope. The review agent
     rebuilds this file from this subproject's own sessions. -->

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)

- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-036 ‚Äî SNAP-S1 MODULE LANE FULLY CLOSED (B-unit)+(C), axiom-clean; file 0-sorry, build
  green 2632.** `M(X,L,F)=‚äï_m Œì(F‚äóL^{‚äóm})` is `DirectSum.Gmodule` over `Œì_*(X,L)` ‚àÄL,F. Three reusable
  recipes landed:
  (i) **`moduleTensorPowAdd_zero_left`** (base-case left unit): put **`tensorPow_zero` in the opening
  `simp only`** alongside the `_eq` bridges + `tensorPowAdd_zero_left` ‚Äî it collapses `L^0` to the unit and
  the B0/B2 bridges to a common `B0.inv` prefix. Goal then sits over `unitModule X`; finish via `hgen`
  reindex-slide (`F‚óÅeqToHom ‚â´ T'.hom = T.hom ‚â´ eqToHom`) + mid-square stated over `ùüô_` (proved by
  `monoidal`) transported by defeq + `reassoc_of% hmid; leftUnitor_naturality_assoc; hgen; Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc`.
  (ii) **`unitModule X ‚âÝ ùüô_` syntactically** (only defeq): `leftUnitor_naturality`/`braiding_tensorUnit_left`/
  `monoidal` special-case `ùüô_` so a positional `rw` on the `unitModule X` whisker FAILS ("pattern not
  found"). Fix: state the unit sub-square over `ùüô_`, prove by `monoidal`, transport by `change`/defeq (NOT
  `rw [show unitModule X = ùüô_ ‚Ä¶]` = motive-not-type-correct).
  (iii) **‚òÖ STATEMENT-elaboration whnf bomb:** a bare `GradedMonoid.GOne.one` projection passed as the
  `+·µ•`-graded `GSMul.smul` argument times out at `whnf` (200k heartbeats) during *statement* elaboration ‚Äî
  `maxRecDepth`/`maxHeartbeats`/`vadd_eq_add` do NOT help. Fix: spell **`(1 : sectionDeg L 0)`** (defeq to
  `GOne.one` via `gOne_one_eq`). Then proof mirrors `sectionsMul_one_mul`.
  (C) `sectionGradedModule_gmodule` = field-port via module bridge `moduleGradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` (mirror of
  ring's `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`), `set_option maxRecDepth 4000 in`. Dead-code helpers
  `tensorBraiding_naturality_{left,right}` (iter-034 flag) confirmed DELETED this iter.

- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-035 ‚Äî MODULE hexagon `moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc` (A) CLOSED axiom-clean + (B-compat)
  `moduleSectionAction_mul_smul` CLOSED.** Pasting the iter-034 banked 95% script: the residual after
  `monoidal` was TWO `whisker_exchange` interchanges, NOT one ‚Äî **`monoidal` does coherence
  (associators/unitors) but NOT interchange of two non-structural atoms on disjoint factors.** Closing
  sequence before final `monoidal`: (T1) top swap `T_{F,c}‚Åª¬π`(WL on `F‚äóL·µè`)‚Üî`T_{a,b}‚Åª¬π`(WR on `L‚Å±‚äóL ≤`) via
  `rw[‚Üê associator_naturality_right_assoc, ‚Üê whisker_exchange_assoc T_ab.inv T_Fc.inv]`; (T2) `Œ≤_{L‚Å±,F}` past
  inner merge `T_{b,c};Œº_{j,k}` via `rw[associator_inv_naturality_right_assoc L‚Å± F Œº, associator_inv_
  naturality_right_assoc L‚Å± F T_bc, whisker_exchange_assoc Œ≤ Œº, whisker_exchange_assoc Œ≤ T_bc]`. Recipe:
  `associator_(inv_)naturality_right_assoc` exposes the `(X‚äóY)‚óÅ` form adjacent to the braiding/atom, then
  `whisker_exchange_assoc f g` interchanges (`‚Üê` for reverse). (B-compat) = exact `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`
  (B7) mirror at module level; **`vadd_eq_add` mandatory** (GSMul degree is `i +·µ• j`); `set_option
  maxRecDepth 4000 in` goes BEFORE the docstring (module congrArg defeq > ring). ‚öÝ The 2 iter-034 helpers
  `tensorBraiding_naturality_{left,right}` turned out DEAD CODE (never called ‚Äî `moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc`
  uses canonical `BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_left` directly); delete next prover touch.
  **(B-unit)+(C) BLOCKED on `moduleTensorPowAdd_zero_left`:** `unitModule X` is defeq but NOT syntactically
  `ùüô_ X.Modules` ‚áí `braiding_tensorUnit_left`/`monoidal` (special-case `ùüô_`) don't fire and `rw[show
  unitModule X = ùüô_ from rfl]` fails "motive not type correct" (sits in dependent `Œª_`/`Œ±_`). Banked
  close: `have hŒ≤ := braiding_tensorUnit_left F` (defeq-typechecks) for the single braiding; state the
  `monoidal`-needing middle over `ùüô_` explicitly then `change`/`convert` (NOT `rw`); mirror
  `tensorPowAdd_zero_left`'s `change`/`erw`/`unitors_equal`.

- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-034 ‚Äî MODULE hexagon `moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc` (A) ~95%: keep `.hom` OPAQUE ‚áí NO
  `_core` NEEDED.** Unlike B6/comm chain, the module symmetric-monoidal hexagon `Œ≤_{L^i,F}` (distinct
  objects, does NOT collapse under invertibility) is proven WITHOUT the generic-`M` `_core` abstraction:
  keep `tensorPowAdd`/`moduleTensorPowAdd` `.hom` as OPAQUE Œº atoms (do NOT unfold `tensorPowAdd_succ`)
  ‚áí the LocalizedMonoidal/X.Modules comp-instance diamond never appears ‚áí plain `rw` works throughout.
  Route (compiles through step 3, verified): `apply Iso.ext; simp only [moduleTensorPowAdd, ..._eq
  bridges, ...]`; (1) slide `Œº_{i,j}` to F-side via `BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_left` converting
  `Œ≤_{L^{i+j},F}‚ÜíŒ≤_{tensorObj L^i L^j,F}`; (2) inject pentagon `tensorPowAdd_assoc L i j k` under `F‚óÅ`
  via `cancel_epi (hp')` + hand-built `hgen` eqToHom-slide; (3) canonicalize `Œ≤_{L^i‚äóL^j,F}` then SPLIT
  via `BraidedCategory.hexagon_reverse` (correct splitter for `Œ≤_{X‚äóY,Z}`, tensor on LEFT); (4) REMAINING
  = commute `Œ≤_{L^i,F}` past inner `Œº_{j,k}` merge via `whisker_exchange` (`monoidal` CANNOT do braiding
  transpositions) then `monoidal`. `associator_naturality_middle_assoc` EXISTS+fires. Companions
  `tensorBraiding_naturality_{left,right}` (private, axiom-clean) = iso naturality of `tensorBraiding`
  via `_eq` bridges + `BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_{left,right}_assoc`. ‚öÝ `lean_multi_attempt`
  BROKEN in `have`-rich proofs ("Unknown identifier") ‚Äî use file edits + `lean_diagnostic_messages`.

- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-031 ‚Äî BOTH braided walls CLOSED; phase (ii) GCommSemiring leg COMPLETE; file SORRY-FREE.**
  The generic-`M` core idiom (proven on B6 pentagon iter-025) ALSO closes the two braided coherence walls
  (`tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided` succ + `tensorPowAdd_comm` succ). **Template:** reduce the iso goal to
  canonical homs via `_eq` bridges + `apply Iso.ext`; state a `private ‚Ä¶_core {M}[MonoidalCategory M]` with
  every `tensorObjIso` bridge as an Iso arg, atoms (Œ≤,Œº) as morphism args, reindex/symmetry as hyps; then
  `refine core (M := LocalizedMonoidal (sheafificationMon X) (sheafificationW X) (localizationUnitIso X))
  _√ó16 ?hyp`. Pinning `M` collapses every `‚â´`/`‚ñ∑`/`‚óÅ`/`Œ±_` to ONE comp instance ‚áí dissolves the
  `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` diamond and lets whisker-distribution fire.
  (1) **brick 1‚Ä≤ succ** core finisher = distribute+cancel `simp` ‚Üí `rw[hk]` ‚Üí
  `rw[‚Üê associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc]` ‚Üí `simp[whisker_assoc, whisker_exchange_assoc]` ‚Üí `monoidal`.
  KEY = invertibility-collapsed hexagon `hŒ≤'`: brick-2 forward hexagon + `hwlrefl` (`WL_A(Œ≤_{L,L})=ùüô` via
  PRIMARY) collapses the `Œ±‚â™‚â´Œ±‚Åª¬π` pair ‚Üí `Œ≤_{L,A‚äóL} = Œ±‚Åª¬π ‚â™‚â´ WR(Œ≤_{L,A})L`.
  (2) **`tensorPowAdd_comm` succ** core finisher = `reassoc_of% hsymm` telescoping, **NO `monoidal`**;
  `hsymm : Œ≤_{L^m,L} ‚â´ Œ≤_{L,L^m} = ùüô` from `tensorBraiding_symm`. ‚öÝ NEVER mix forward `whiskerLeft_comp`
  with `‚Üê whiskerLeft_comp_assoc` (loop: "Possibly looping simp theorem").
  ‚öÝ **Œ≤-split MUST be hand-built-first** via brick 2 `tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward` (canonical-first kills
  `braiding_tensor_right_hom` ‚Äî hand-built `tensorObj` 2nd factor). ‚öÝ **Reindex eqToHom:** `subst`/`rw` FAIL
  on the dependent motive; use generalize helper `gen` + `rintro ‚Ä¶ rfl` + `exact gen (show ‚Ä¶ from by omega)`
  (explicit `show`, not bare `by omega`); two trailing eqToHom ‚Üí `convert gen ‚Ä¶ using 2; exact eqToHom_trans
  _ _` (bare `exact gen` ‚Üí 200000-heartbeat isDefEq timeout). **Capstone** `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`
  = field-port over `gsemiring`, `mul_comm := gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_comm ‚Ä¶) (sectionsMul_mul_comm ‚Ä¶)`.

- **‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-030 ‚Äî 2 axiom-clean Œ≤-symmetry bricks DELIVERED; brick 1‚Ä≤ base CLOSED, succ = the B6 wall.**
  (1) **`tensorBraiding_symm` (Œ≤‚àòŒ≤=ùüô for the hand-built braiding):** `X.Modules` has NO registered
  `SymmetricCategory` instance (only `braidedCategory` `local instance`), so `SymmetricCategory.symmetry`
  cannot fire on `Œ≤_` in `X.Modules`. Descend through the presheaf: `apply Iso.ext; rw [tensorBraiding,
  tensorBraiding]; simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, Iso.refl_hom]; exact term-mode
  (sheafification.map_comp _ _).symm.trans ((congrArg sheafification.map hsymm).trans (map_id))` with
  `hsymm := SymmetricCategory.symmetry (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) _ _`. ‚öÝ `rw [‚Üê sheafification.map_comp]`
  FAILS on the comp-instance diamond ‚Äî use the term-mode `.trans` chain. (2) **`braiding_canonical_self_eq_
  id_of_isInvertible` (canonical `(Œ≤_ L L).hom = ùüô`):** read off PRIMARY `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_
  isInvertible` through `tensorBraiding_eq`: `h := congrArg Iso.hom (tensorBraiding_eq L L); rw [PRIMARY] at
  h; simp only [Iso.refl_hom, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom] at h; rw [eq_comm, Iso.inv_comp_eq] at h; exact
  (cancel_mono (tensorObjIso L L).hom).mp (h.trans (Category.id_comp _).symm)`. (3) **brick 1‚Ä≤
  `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided` (order-reversing) base `m=0` CLOSED:** replace `Œ≤_{L,ùüô}` by unitors
  (`tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit`), canonical descent (KEY: `tensorPow_zero` IN the simp set so
  `L^0`/`unitModule X` unify + bridges telescope), finish `simp only [‚Üê Category.assoc]; rw [‚Üê Iso.comp_inv_
  eq, ‚Üê MonoidalCategory.rightUnitor_naturality]; simp only [Category.assoc]; congr 1; monoidal`. (4) **‚öÝ
  succ DEAD END (do NOT retry):** canonical-FIRST descent makes the braiding `Œ≤_ L (tensorObj (L^k) L)`
  whose 2nd factor is HAND-BUILT `tensorObj`, so `BraidedCategory.braiding_tensor_right_hom` (pattern
  `(Œ≤_ X (Y‚äóZ)).hom`) never fires. Split the braiding at the HAND-BUILT level via brick 2
  `tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward` BEFORE descent; the succ is then the B6-scale opaque-Œº wall (needs a
  generic-`M` core like `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core` to cancel `Œº_{c,k}‚ñ∑L` across the comp diamond, then
  `monoidal`).
- **‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-029 ‚Äî comm succ DECOMPOSED; 2 axiom-clean bricks; the glue needs the order-REVERSING recursion.**
  (1) **Descending a Mathlib braided coherence to the hand-built braiding** (`tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward`,
  the forward hexagon; mirror of base helper `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit`): `rw` the `_eq` bridges
  (`tensorBraiding_eq`, whisker `_eq`) ‚Üí `Iso.ext` ‚Üí expand to hom-level ‚Üí cancel `tensorObjIso` bridge pairs
  via `simp only [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc, hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc]` ‚Üí residual
  canonical identity via `BraidedCategory.{braiding_naturality_right,hexagon_forward}_assoc` (convert
  `Œ≤_ F (A.tensorObj B)`‚Üícanonical `Œ≤_ F (A‚äóB)`, trailing `‚ñ∑F` bridge pair cancels). (2) **Isolation pattern**
  for `X = P.symm ‚â™‚â´ S ‚â™‚â´ R.symm` from `P ‚â™‚â´ X ‚â™‚â´ R = S`: `apply Iso.ext; have hb := congrArg Iso.hom L;
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom] at hb ‚ä¢; rw [Iso.eq_inv_comp, Iso.eq_comp_inv]; exact hb` (arbitrary
  composite `S`). (3) **Dependent-motive dodge:** never `rw` the OBJECT `tensorPow (c+1) ‚Üí tensorObj (L^c) L`
  ("motive not type correct"); `rw [show <iso at tensorPow(c+1)> = <iso at tensorObj> from rfl]` ‚Äî rewrite the
  whole ISO (fixed type, defeq). (4) **DEAD END (do NOT repeat):** the order-PRESERVING first-index recursion
  `Œº_{c+1,m}=Œº_{c,1+m}‚àò(L^c‚óÅŒΩ_m)‚àòŒ±` (= B6 pentagon at `(c,1,m)`, `tensorPowAdd_succ_left`) is correct infra but
  injects a stray opaque `Œº_{1,m}` (grows with `m`, never on the LHS) ‚áí unclosable for the comm glue. The glue
  needs the **order-REVERSING** `Œº_{c+1,m}=Œ±‚â™‚â´(L^c‚óÅŒ≤_{L,L^m})‚â™‚â´Œ±‚Åª¬π‚â™‚â´(Œº_{c,m}‚ñ∑L)‚â™‚â´reindex`, invertibility-gated
  (consumes `Œ≤_{L,L}=ùüô`). Given it, the comm succ residual `(*)` closes via `SymmetricCategory.symmetry`
  (`Braided/Basic.lean:369`) + associator cancel + `monoidal`. Brick 1‚Ä≤ proof = induction on `m`, succ splits
  `Œ≤_{L,L^{m+1}}` via `BraidedCategory.braiding_tensor_right_hom` (`Basic.lean:~96`).
- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-028 ‚Äî `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` DELIVERED axiom-clean (the gated comm
  brick, Stacks 01CR; basis-local sheafification descent, Route A).** Three reusable sub-patterns:
  (1) **Ring-spelling diamond dissolution** ‚Äî when a generic `ModuleCat` helper needs
  `Module.Invertible R M` but the call site spells the ring two defeq-but-syntactically-distinct ways
  (`X.presheaf.obj (op U)` vs `X.sheaf.obj ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ ‚Ä¶ (op U)`), pass the `Module.Invertible` instance as
  an EXPLICIT argument (`hM`), NOT via `haveI`/instance search ‚Äî it unifies by defeq and sidesteps the
  `failed to synthesize CommSemiring/Module` that instance synthesis throws on the wrong spelling.
  (2) **Sheaf-descent of a presheaf-morphism equation** ‚Äî `(PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf _).map_injective`
  ‚Üí `TopCat.Sheaf.hom_ext _ _ hbasis` (the UNDERLYING `Ab` sheaf via `SheafOfModules.toSheaf`, plus the
  `IsInvertible`-carried basis; **NOT `Scheme.Modules.hom_ext`, which is the ‚ä§-trap**) ‚Üí per-basis-open the
  component is `ùüô` (`erw [PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf_map_app_apply]`; `erw [braiding_hom_app]` ‚Äî plain
  `rw` no-match). (3) **Sheafified-iso = ùüô via the adjunction** ‚Äî `Iso.ext` ‚Üí `change sheafification.map
  f.hom = ùüô` ‚Üí `(sheafificationAdjunction ‚Ä¶).homEquiv ‚Ä¶.injective` ‚Üí `rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit √ó2];
  erw [CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id, Category.comp_id]` (plain `rw`/`simp` FAIL on the `ùüô`) ‚Üí
  `(unit.naturality f.hom).symm.trans (descent_eqn)`. Prereq: `IsInvertible` re-signed (iter-028) to a
  `Prop` carrying `‚àÉ Œπ (U:Œπ‚ÜíOpens), Opens.IsBasis (range U) ‚àß ‚àÄi, Module.Invertible Œì(X,U·µ¢) Œì(L,U·µ¢)` as
  data. Uses `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl` (`Mathlib.RingTheory.PicardGroup`).
- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-027 ‚Äî graded-RING ASSEMBLY DELIVERED, axiom-clean ‚àÄL (the deliverable, Stacks 01CV).**
  Pattern for building a `DirectSum.GSemiring` on a sheaf-section tensor-power family once the coherence
  chain is closed (field-port of `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorPower.Basic`): (1) **class-valued defs MUST be
  `@[reducible]`** (carrier depends on the free `L` ‚áí cannot be a global instance ‚Äî same as TensorPower).
  (2) **GMonoid layer** = the three hypothesis-free coherence clauses (`one_mul`/`mul_one`/`mul_assoc`) each
  wrapped by `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` (transport-mediated eq ‚Üí dependent-pair eq); `gnpow` takes the Mathlib
  default. (3) **Bilinearity fields need `erw`, NOT `rw`/`simp only`** ‚Äî the `TensorProduct.{tmul_zero,
  zero_tmul,tmul_add,add_tmul}` rewrites do not fire under `simp only` across the `ModuleCat.Hom.hom`/`DFunLike`
  coercion of `sectionsMul`/`tensorPowAdd`; working clause = `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.
  tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]` (push through the `TensorProduct` step then BOTH `ModuleCat` morphisms).
  (4) **`natCast := fun n => n ‚Ä¢ (GOne.one : sectionDeg L 0)`**, laws `zero_nsmul`/`succ_nsmul`. (5) **Sanity
  `Semiring` check must be a `Nonempty (Semiring (DirectSum ‚Ñï (family)))` THEOREM, not an `example`** ‚Äî an
  `example` is elaborated as a def and triggers codegen on the noncomputable carrier ("failed to compile,
  consider noncomputable"); the `‚®Å m, ...` big-operator binder also mis-elaborates here, use `DirectSum ‚Ñï f`.
  Import `Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Ring` for `DirectSum.GSemiring` (not transitive). **`\leanok` is per-decl
  sorry-freeness, NOT transitive `\uses`-closure** ‚Äî a fully-proved decl whose blueprint `\uses` cites a
  bundled lemma carrying an unrelated sorried clause still earns `\leanok` (manual override if sync's
  closure-check skips it).
- **‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-026 ‚Äî B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` FULLY CLOSED, axiom-clean (`[propext, Classical.choice,
  Quot.sound]`, verified first-hand). ‚áí the ENTIRE B1‚ÄìB7 ‚àÄL associativity coherence of `‚äï‚Çò Œì(L^‚äóm)`
  is complete. SNAP 4‚Üí3 sorries.** Closing technique = **section/element-level assembly that dodges
  the comp-instance diamond entirely** (contrast B6, which needed the generic-`M` core to dodge it):
  a pure `rw`-chain `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]` ‚Üí RIGHT slide `sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural` ‚Üí
  LEFT slide `sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural` ‚Üí `rw [‚Üê tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul ‚Ä¶]` (B5
  backwards) ‚Üí `exact congrArg (fun i => (i.hom.val.app (op‚ä§)).hom z) (tensorPowAdd_assoc L na nb nc)`
  (B6 iso-pentagon at a common base element `z`). **WHY it closes with no `monoidal`/`simp`/diamond
  gymnastics:** at the section (element) level, functor-comp / `Iso.trans_hom` / `sectionsCast_apply`
  are all `rfl`, so both sides are literally `Œì(¬∑)(z)` for the two pentagon composites and the
  `congrArg` of the iso-level coherence lands directly. **LESSON: when a coherence can be stated AND
  consumed at the element level, do so ‚Äî the `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` diamond is a
  morphism-level artifact that never surfaces on elements.** The two Œº-slide helpers
  `sectionsMul_whisker{Right,Left}_natural` (private, iso form `e : F ‚âÖ F'`) are the EXACT parallel of
  `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`: `sectionsMul F G = Œ∑_{F‚äó_p G}.app(op‚ä§)`,
  `(tensorObjWhiskerRightIso e G).hom = sheafification.map (whiskerRight (toPresheaf e.hom)(toPresheaf G))`,
  slide = Œ∑-naturality along that presheaf whisker; `e1`/`hw` = rfl; NO diamond (recipes a/b/c NOT needed).
- **‚òÖ‚òÖ iter-025 ‚Äî B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` FULLY CLOSED, axiom-clean (`[propext, Classical.choice,
  Quot.sound]`, `lean_verify`-confirmed first-hand); 8-iter plateau (017‚Üí024) BROKEN. SNAP 5‚Üí4 sorries.**
  The succ-case canonical pentagon was discharged by NEW `private lemma tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core
  {M}[Category M][MonoidalCategory M]` (~L3072; ~17 bridge isos + 6 `Œº` morphisms + `foldhyp` + `hŒº5`),
  wired by `exact ‚Ä¶ (M := LocalizedMonoidal (sheafificationMon X) (sheafificationW X)
  (localizationUnitIso X)) (5 goal-only isos pinned explicit) (foldhyp := ihRh) (hŒº5 := ‚Ä¶)` under
  `set_option maxRecDepth 4000 in`. **REUSABLE ‚Äî generic-`M` core + pinned `exact` crosses the
  `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` comp-instance diamond** (the close path scoped in iter-024, now
  EXECUTED): (a) abstract the stalled canonical hom-equation to a free monoidal `M` ‚Äî develop there
  (ONE instance ‚áí NO diamond ‚áí `lean_run_code` iterates fast), close with explicit fold (`foldhyp'` =
  `(cancel_epi ‚Ä¶).mp foldhyp`) + cancellation `simp` + `rw [foldhyp']` + ONE
  `‚Üê associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc` + `simp [whisker_assoc, whisker_exchange_assoc]` THEN
  `monoidal`. **`monoidal` ALONE STALLS** ‚Äî it cannot peel the non-structural `Œº`-atoms nor cancel the
  opaque `tensorObjIso`-bridge pairs; the explicit fold + one associator-naturality + whisker-exchange
  are mandatory before it. (b) Wire via `exact core (M := LocalizedMonoidal ‚Ä¶)` with `maxRecDepth 4000`
  (stack-depth, NOT the forbidden heartbeat bump) and goal-only isos pinned so heads align ‚áí `exact`'s
  `isDefEq` bridges the rfl-defeq diamond that `rw`/`simp`/`erw`/`hc`-bridge ALL fail on (200k-whnf
  timeout). Same idiom as B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` and ‚òÖ. **Staging into sub-lemmas (the
  plan's directive) was UNNECESSARY** ‚Äî the monolithic generic-`M` core closes in one chain once built
  in the diamond-free generic setting; the size-ceiling the prover hit in iters 018‚Äì024 was a tooling
  artifact of developing ON the diamond, removed by abstracting OFF it. The two close-path entries below
  (iters 023/024) are now EXECUTED/SUPERSEDED ‚Äî kept as derivation history.
- **‚òÖ iter-023 ROOT-CAUSE REFACTOR ‚Äî recursion ORIENTATION, not tactics, was the bottleneck (SNAP, sorry
